log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Warforged — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 4 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Werewolf: WIS save [d20:10+0=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Werewolf: WIS save [d20:4+0=4 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Werewolf: WIS save [d20:2+0=2 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Werewolf: WIS save [d20:20+0=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 3/4 targets affected.
--- Werewolf --- HP: 58/58 | AC: 11 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Werewolf --- HP: 58/58 | AC: 11 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
